summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 2→Jul 8 vs Jun 25→Jul 1* · Revenue +125% (72,873 vs 32,410 EGP) · Spend +117% · ROAS 3.82 (+4%).
   • CPC: 7.41 → 8.79 EGP (+19%, up (drag))
   • CVR: 2.19% → 1.8% (-18%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,247 → 1,869 EGP (+50%, up (good))
   *Read:* *AOV* rose +50%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *24,258 EGP of revenue*.
     That drove ROAS +4%.
     Revenue +125% because spend +117%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was <https://business.facebook.com/adsmanager/manage/ads?act=336343742536460&selected_ad_ids=120254469312450011|Sumbunny swimwear s25>, its AOV went 650.0 EGP→2384.33 EGP on 1,977 EGP spend (~21% of the swing).
